name: Daphney & Frankie
role: Wedding · Dec 12, 2026 · 130 guests · Branford House at Avery Point, Groton CT

handling.tone: Honest planners on a real budget. Don't oversell. Don't underestimate them either — they've already booked venue + DJ. Lead with transparency about what $8K buys vs what stretching to $10K buys.
handling.voice_adjustments: Andre voice: direct, honest, peer. Acknowledge the budget reality, then offer two options. Don't push; respect their process.
handling.context: Zola Gold inquiry Apr 22. Venue + DJ booked. Catering capped ~$8K, overall budget flex to $20K. December coastal CT wedding. Status set 'Probably Not' but premature given engagement. ~95+ miles from Comeketo's typical zone — logistics flag.

context_anchors: Branford House at Avery Point, Groton CT — UConn-managed waterfront mansion
Catering cap $8K / overall budget up to $20K (flexible)
Bride is Daphney; status 'Probably Not' likely premature

lead.venue: The Branford House at Avery Point, Groton CT
lead.next_move: Direct honest message: 10-min call OR two written options ($8K vs $10K)

enrichment.identity_notes: Younger couple (informal Zola phrasing, Zola usage, capped budget with admitted flexibility = honest planners). 203 area code = CT local. Branford House is UConn-owned waterfront mansion.
win_angles: They're not actually capped — $20K overall, $8K catering = permission to push to $9-10K
December coastal wedding = comfort food momentum, churrasco lands harder
Vendor compatibility (Jacob Graham DJ) — coordinate timeline
Transparency builds trust at low budgets — say $8K is tight for 130, then offer two versions
nepq_openers: Continuation: 'Daphney, before this slips off radar — most useful next step? 10-min call to talk what's realistic at the budget, or two options in writing first?'
Frame: 'You and Frankie clearly did your homework picking Branford and locking your DJ early. What I want to figure out is whether catering at your number is something we can do well.'
Anchor: '$8K for 130 is doable — but not the dream version. If we have $1.5K of flex, meal goes from fine to memorable. What does that trade off against?'
open_gaps: Whether Branford House allows outside catering
Service style preference at this budget
enrichment.strategic_note: 'Probably Not' status feels premature: confirmed Zola Gold + real venue + DJ booked + stated budget with flexibility + reasonable runway. Not a 'won't buy' — a 'needs the right offer at the right price.' One direct honest re-engagement that respects budget and offers clear choice. If silent, Probably Not becomes appropriate.

comms.summary: Zola Gold inquiry forwarded — venue, date, budget, vendor list
What time best to reach you?

notes: Status 'Probably Not' premature — flag for review
Honest budget conversation is the unlock
Out-of-zone but worth it given $8-10K range
